scripts.dev: cd ../ags-v3 && npx sass --no-charset ../greeter/style.scss ../greeter/style.css && sed -i '/@charset/d' ../greeter/style.css && cd ../greeter && ags run app.ts
scripts.build: mkdir -p build && cd ../ags-v3 && npx sass --no-charset ../greeter/style.scss ../greeter/style.css && sed -i '/@charset/d' ../greeter/style.css && cd ../greeter && ags bundle app.ts build/crystal-greeter
